title: Scoop: U.S. considers $20 billion cash-for-uranium deal with Iran
snippet: The Trump administration is considering unfreezing $20 billion in Iranian assets as part of a deal for Iran to give up its enriched uranium stockpile. A 3-page memorandum of understanding is under discussion. Under the compromise, some highly enriched uranium would be shipped to a third country and some would be down-blended in Iran under international monitoring.
tag_reason: Exclusive scoop revealing specific $20B figure and 3-page MoU framework — new information not previously reported
